name: noesis
description: Connects an agent to the Noesis code-retrieval MCP and ships the noesis-mcp skill (usage guide, tool reference, and helper scripts).

base_url.title: Noesis base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of the running Noesis service (no trailing slash). The MCP endpoint is this URL + /mcp/. Change only if you run uvicorn on a non-default host or port.
